Appearances:
Plaintiff Meridian Management Group is present. Represented by Lucky Stewart.
Attorney Marina Franco appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rachel Torrey is present.
Attorney Mary Catherine Weiderhold representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jonathan Polland, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAR-18-2013 remains on calendar.
